name: OnStationAttributeTriggerAll
title: OnStationAttributeTriggerAll
description: This callback is called when the following two conditions are met:

The purpose of this callback is to define a reaction on all triggerable attributes of all stations in the scenario. If you only want to react on the attribute triggering of the station’s own attributes only, please use OnStationAttributeTrigger callback function instead.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: Name of the scenario station attribute

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
